creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
kernel config: http://vermaden.go.pl/tmp/SMP-7
make.conf: http://vermaden.go.pl/tmp/make.conf

My LG DVD-RW GSA-H42N always worked without any errors on 6.2-RELEASE/
STABLE and now from BETA1 to BETA4 these errors shows at boot, DVDRW
works, it also burns as usual but should these messages show?

acd0: DVDR <HL-DT-ST DVDRAM GSA-H42N/RL00> at ata1-master UDMA66
GEOM_LABEL: Label for provider acd0 is iso9660/CDROM.
acd0: FAILURE - INQUIRY ILLEGAL REQUEST asc=0x24 ascq=0x00 sks=0x40 0x00 0x01
acd0: FAILURE - INQUIRY ILLEGAL REQUEST asc=0x24 ascq=0x00 sks=0x40 0x00 0x01

Regards
vermaden

Fix: 

unknown
How-To-Repeat: everytime at boot these messages shows, you do not have to do anything,
just reboot(8).

acd0: FAILURE - INQUIRY ILLEGAL REQUEST asc=0x24 ascq=0x00 sks=0x40 0x00 0x01
acd0: FAILURE - INQUIRY ILLEGAL REQUEST asc=0x24 ascq=0x00 sks=0x40 0x00 0x01
